text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I did it! I got first place!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting closer—another step forward in
perfecting the winning equation!
choice_data_list: Gotta keep your eye on the prize, though.
Gotta keep your eye on the prize, though.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting closer—another step forward in
perfecting the winning equation!
choice_data_list: Gotta keep your eye on the prize, though.
Gotta keep your eye on the prize, though.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Really, though, I should also be
congratulating you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This victory belongs to the both of us. We're
chasing this dream together!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I plan to prove the superiority of my logical
approach in the next race too! After which...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: We'll celebrate our victory together once more!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes, I suppose I mustn't get carried away.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Pride comes before the fall, as they say. One
should always take stock of what mistakes were
made and learn for the next time around.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
On that note... Were there any errors with my
opening... or my last spurt? I feel like I could
spend all day combing through my performance.
choice_data_list: Why don't we review it together real quick?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Perfect! And thank you for making sure I don't
rest on my laurels.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to have you in my corner.
